findings.description: Event exported type clashes with DOM built-in Event; API Extractor renames to Event_2 leaking _2 suffix. Fix via @clientName to AssetEvent in spec.

ciStatus: UnitTest FAILED (missing recordings) on ubuntu_22x_node, windows_20x_node, macoslatest_24x_node (buildId=6128823)
notes: Beta release 1.2.0-beta.1; adds Credentials, Policies operation groups and NamespaceDevices.revoke; API version 2026-03-01-preview; user agent version aligned; CHANGELOG compares with 1.1.0 stable (correct); no alpha versions; Event naming clash with DOM is main design issue
